title: Clothing items
question: You wear these on your feet.
explanation: Shoes go on your feet to protect them when you walk.

title: Clothing items
question: A woman might wear this to a party. It covers the body from shoulders to knees.
explanation: A dress is a one-piece garment that covers the upper body and legs.

title: Clothing items
question: You wear this on your head to keep warm or block the sun.
explanation: A hat sits on your head. It protects from sun or cold.

title: Clothing items
question: These cover your legs. Another word is 'pants'.
explanation: Trousers (or pants) are clothing for your legs.

title: Clothing items
question: You wear this on the top part of your body. It has sleeves.
explanation: A shirt covers your chest and arms.

title: Clothing items
question: You wear these on your hands when it is cold.
explanation: Gloves keep your hands warm in cold weather.

title: Clothing items
question: You wear these inside your shoes.
explanation: Socks go on your feet, inside your shoes.

title: Clothing items
question: This keeps your trousers up. You wear it around your waist.
explanation: A belt goes around your waist to hold trousers in place.

title: Clothing items
question: You wear this around your neck when it is cold outside.
explanation: A scarf wraps around your neck for warmth.

title: Clothing items
question: This is a warm piece of clothing you wear over your shirt in winter.
explanation: A jacket is an outer layer that keeps you warm.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: The sun is shining and the sky is blue. The weather is ___.
explanation: When the sun shines brightly, we say the weather is sunny.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: Water is falling from the sky. The weather is ___.
explanation: When water drops fall from clouds, the weather is rainy.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: You cannot see the sun. The sky is grey and full of clouds. It is ___.
explanation: When clouds cover the sky, the weather is cloudy.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: The trees are moving because the air is blowing hard. It is very ___.
explanation: When air moves fast and blows things around, it is windy.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: White ice falls from the sky in winter. It is ___.
explanation: Snow is frozen water that falls as white flakes in cold weather.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: It is 35 degrees Celsius outside. The ___ is very high today.
explanation: Temperature measures how hot or cold it is. 35 degrees is very hot.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: You cannot see far because the air is thick and white. It is ___.
explanation: Fog is a thick mist that makes it hard to see.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: There is bright light in the sky during a storm, then a loud sound. The light is called ___.
explanation: Lightning is the bright flash of light during a storm.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: After rain, the ___ sometimes appears in the sky with many colours.
explanation: A rainbow is an arc of colours that can appear when sun shines through rain.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: We use a ___ to measure the temperature.
explanation: A thermometer is the tool that shows temperature in degrees.

title: Seasons
question: The season when flowers start to grow and the weather gets warmer after winter.
explanation: Spring comes after winter. Plants begin to grow again.

title: Seasons
question: The hottest season of the year. People go swimming and eat ice cream.
explanation: Summer is the warmest season. Days are long and hot.

title: Seasons
question: The season when leaves change colour and fall from trees.
explanation: In autumn (also called fall), leaves turn red, orange, and yellow.

title: Seasons
question: The coldest season. Sometimes there is snow on the ground.
explanation: Winter is the coldest time of year. Days are short.

title: Animals: pets
question: This small animal lives in your home, says 'meow', and likes to catch mice.
explanation: A cat is a common pet that meows and is known for catching mice.

title: Animals: pets
question: This animal is called 'man's best friend'. It barks and wags its tail.
explanation: A dog is a loyal pet that barks and loves to play.

title: Animals: pets
question: This pet lives in water inside a glass tank. You cannot hold it.
explanation: A fish is a pet that lives in water. You watch it swim.

title: Animals: pets
question: This small, fluffy pet has long ears and likes to eat carrots.
explanation: A rabbit has long ears and soft fur. It hops around.

title: Animals: pets
question: This colourful bird can learn to copy human words.
explanation: A parrot is a bird that can repeat words people say.

title: Animals: farm
question: This large animal gives us milk. It says 'moo'.
explanation: A cow is a farm animal that produces milk.

title: Animals: farm
question: This pink animal lives on a farm and loves mud.
explanation: A pig is a farm animal known for rolling in mud.

title: Animals: farm
question: This animal gives us wool for warm clothes. It says 'baa'.
explanation: A sheep has thick wool that is used to make clothing.

title: Animals: farm
question: This animal lays eggs. It says 'cluck'.
explanation: A chicken is a bird on the farm that lays eggs.

title: Animals: farm
question: People ride this tall, strong animal. It says 'neigh'.
explanation: A horse is a large, strong animal that people can ride.

title: Animals: wild
question: This very large grey animal has a long nose called a trunk.
explanation: An elephant is the largest land animal. Its long nose is a trunk.

title: Animals: wild
question: This big cat is called the 'king of the jungle'. It has a mane.
explanation: A lion is a large wild cat. The male has a mane of hair.

title: Animals: wild
question: This tall animal has a very long neck and eats leaves from high trees.
explanation: A giraffe has the longest neck of any animal.

title: Animals: wild
question: This animal has black and white stripes on its body.
explanation: A zebra looks like a horse with black and white stripes.

title: Animals: wild
question: This large animal sleeps through winter. It likes to eat fish and honey.
explanation: A bear hibernates in winter and eats fish and honey.

title: Dressing for weather
question: It is raining outside. You should take ___.
explanation: An umbrella keeps you dry when it rains.

title: Dressing for weather
question: It is very sunny and hot. You should wear ___ to protect your eyes.
explanation: Sunglasses protect your eyes from bright sunlight.

title: Dressing for weather
question: It is snowing and very cold. You need to wear ___ on your hands.
explanation: Gloves keep your hands warm in snow and cold weather.

title: Dressing for weather
question: You are going to the beach in summer. You should wear ___.
explanation: A swimsuit is what you wear for swimming at the beach.

title: Dressing for weather
question: It is cold and raining. You should wear ___ to keep your feet dry.
explanation: Boots protect your feet and keep them dry in rain.

title: Dressing for weather
question: It is windy and cold. You should wear a warm ___ over your shirt.
explanation: A coat is a thick outer layer that protects from wind and cold.

title: Weather vocabulary
question: In English, when it rains very heavily we say it is ___.
explanation: Pouring means rain is falling very hard and fast.

title: Clothing items
question: Women often wear this. It hangs from the waist and covers the legs, but is not divided like trousers.
explanation: A skirt hangs from the waist. Unlike trousers, it is one open piece.

title: Animals: wild
question: This is the largest animal on Earth. It lives in the ocean and breathes air at the surface.
explanation: A whale is the largest animal alive. It is a mammal and must breathe air.

title: Animals: farm
question: Which word names a baby sheep?
explanation: A baby sheep is called a lamb. Puppies are baby dogs, kittens are baby cats, chicks are baby chickens.

title: Dressing for weather
question: When the weather is warm but not hot, you can wear a light ___.
explanation: A T-shirt is a light top, good for warm weather.
